revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "‚ÜĶ<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410164509|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=EstablishmentsInCenturyBC here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=EstablishmentsInCenturyBC for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Category series navigation}}
{| class="toccolours" style="margin: 1em auto 1em auto"
|{{Category link if exists|{{{3}}}-century BC establishments|‚Üź}} '''[[{{{2}}} century BC|{{{2}}}-century BC]] establishments''' {{Category link if exists|{{{4}}}-century BC establishments|‚Üí}} 
|<!-- 
 Table of decades for 4th century BC onwards
 -->{{#ifexpr: {{{1}}} > 3 | |{{Category link if exists|{{{1}}}90s BC establishments|{{{1}}}90s}} ‚ÄĘ {{Category link if exists|{{{1}}}80s BC establishments|{{{1}}}80s}} ‚ÄĘ {{Category link if exists|{{{1}}}70s BC establishments|{{{1}}}70s}} ‚ÄĘ {{Category link if exists|{{{1}}}60s BC establishments|{{{1}}}60s}} ‚ÄĘ {{Category link if exists|{{{1}}}50s BC establishments|{{{1}}}50s}} ‚ÄĘ {{Category link if exists|{{{1}}}40s BC establishments|{{{1}}}40s}} ‚ÄĘ {{Category link if exists|{{{1}}}30s BC establishments|{{{1}}}30s}} ‚ÄĘ {{Category link if exists|{{{1}}}20s BC establishments|{{{1}}}20s}} ‚ÄĘ {{Category link if exists|{{{1}}}10s BC establishments|{{{1}}}10s}} ‚ÄĘ {{Category link if exists|{{{1}}}00s BC establishments|{{{1}}}00s}} }}
|}

This category is for organizations, places, companies, or other things founded or established in the [[{{{2}}} century BC]].<noinclude>
{{documentation|content=
This template is for categories listing things established in a century BC.

[[Category:Establishments-by-century templates]]
}}

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=EstablishmentsInCenturyBC for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Category series navigation}}
{| class="toccolours" style="margin: 1em auto 1em auto"
|{{Category link if exists|{{{3}}}-century BC establishments|‚Üź}} '''[[{{{2}}} century BC|{{{2}}}-century BC]] establishments''' {{Category link if exists|{{{4}}}-century BC establishments|‚Üí}} 
|{{#ifexpr: {{{1}}} > 3 | |{{Category link if exists|{{{1}}}90s BC establishments|{{{1}}}90s}} ‚ÄĘ {{Category link if exists|{{{1}}}80s BC establishments|{{{1}}}80s}} ‚ÄĘ {{Category link if exists|{{{1}}}70s BC establishments|{{{1}}}70s}} ‚ÄĘ {{Category link if exists|{{{1}}}60s BC establishments|{{{1}}}60s}} ‚ÄĘ {{Category link if exists|{{{1}}}50s BC establishments|{{{1}}}50s}} ‚ÄĘ {{Category link if exists|{{{1}}}40s BC establishments|{{{1}}}40s}} ‚ÄĘ {{Category link if exists|{{{1}}}30s BC establishments|{{{1}}}30s}} ‚ÄĘ {{Category link if exists|{{{1}}}20s BC establishments|{{{1}}}20s}} ‚ÄĘ {{Category link if exists|{{{1}}}10s BC establishments|{{{1}}}10s}} ‚ÄĘ {{Category link if exists|{{{1}}}00s BC establishments|{{{1}}}00s}} }}
|}

This category is for organizations, places, companies, or other things founded or established in the [[{{{2}}} century BC]].<noinclude>
{{documentation|content=
This template is for categories listing things established in a century BC.

[[Category:Establishments-by-century templates]]
}}

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
